Designed to refine the management of partially paid securities, the suggested reforms include tighter payment deadlines and a swifter process for retrieving pledged investments. This strategic shift aims to elevate market liquidity and lessen prolonged delays for investors while allowing for flexibility in certain challenging scenarios.

title: Sebi plans risk-based calculation for brokers’ variable net worth
